title: T5013 Statement of Partnership Income - Canada.ca
content:
## T5013 Statement of Partnership Income

## Notice to the reader
You can file your return electronically using My Business Account. It's fast, convenient and secure. To register, go to Sign in to your CRA account .
Are you a representative living in Canada or a non-resident representative living in the United States? You can use My Business Account services by registering with Represent a Client. To register, go to Sign in to your CRA account .
You must download the accessible fillable PDF to your computer. Use Acrobat Reader 10 or later to open the file. Do not click the link to open it in your web browser.
- Download and save the PDF to your computer
- Open the downloaded PDF in Acrobat Reader 10 or later
The T5013 Information slip for the authorized member of a partnership to report to each partner their share of income for the fiscal period that the partner has to report on the appropriate income tax return for the year.

## Ways to get the form
- Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher. Accessible Fillable PDF (t5013-fill-21e.pdf) Previous years: Accessible Fillable PDFs This form is also available for the years listed below: 2020 – Fillable PDF (t5013-fill-20f.pdf) 2015 – Fillable PDF (t5013-fill-15f.pdf) 2014 – Fillable PDF (t5013-fill-14f.pdf) 2013 – Fillable PDF (t5013-fill-13b.pdf)

### Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader
You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher.
- Accessible Fillable PDF (t5013-fill-21e.pdf)
This form is also available for the years listed below:
- 2020 – Fillable PDF (t5013-fill-20f.pdf)
- 2015 – Fillable PDF (t5013-fill-15f.pdf)
- 2014 – Fillable PDF (t5013-fill-14f.pdf)
- 2013 – Fillable PDF (t5013-fill-13b.pdf)
- Print and fill out by hand Standard print PDF (t5013-21e.pdf) Large print PDF (t5013-lp-21e.pdf) Previous years: Standard print PDFs This form is also available for the years listed below: 2020 – Standard print PDF (t5013-20e.pdf) 2015 – Standard print PDF (t5013-15e.pdf) 2014 – Standard print PDF (t5013-14b.pdf) 2013 – Standard print PDF (t5013-13b.pdf) 2011 – Standard print PDF (t5013-11b.pdf) 2010 – Standard print PDF (t5013-10b.pdf) 2009 – Standard print PDF (t5013-09b.pdf) 2006 – Standard print PDF (t5013-06b.pdf) 2003 – Standard print PDF (t5013-03b.pdf) 2002 – Standard print PDF (t5013-02b.pdf)

### Print and fill out by hand
- Standard print PDF (t5013-21e.pdf)
- Large print PDF (t5013-lp-21e.pdf)
This form is also available for the years listed below:
- 2020 – Standard print PDF (t5013-20e.pdf)
- 2015 – Standard print PDF (t5013-15e.pdf)
- 2014 – Standard print PDF (t5013-14b.pdf)
- 2013 – Standard print PDF (t5013-13b.pdf)
- 2011 – Standard print PDF (t5013-11b.pdf)
- 2010 – Standard print PDF (t5013-10b.pdf)
- 2009 – Standard print PDF (t5013-09b.pdf)
- 2006 – Standard print PDF (t5013-06b.pdf)
- 2003 – Standard print PDF (t5013-03b.pdf)
- 2002 – Standard print PDF (t5013-02b.pdf)
- Download and listen Use your preferred screen reader to listen to the e-text file. E-text (t5013-21e.txt)
Use your preferred screen reader to listen to the e-text file.
- E-text (t5013-21e.txt)
- Ask for an alternate format You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print. Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities

### Ask for an alternate format
You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print.
- Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
